title: Sidebar Changes Archive
description: Studio UI for **Sidebar Changes Archive**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Changes Archive**.
context: Studio UI for **Sidebar Changes Archive**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Changes Archive**.

rules.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data and wires actions
rules: The sidebar MUST render lists from global poll hooks (`hooks-changes-collection`, `hooks-workspaces-specs`, etc.). Row actions (open, restore, discard) MUST call the appropriate mutate port methods.

rules.requirement: archive row opens archived snapshot not active change
rules: When the user selects a row in the Archive section, Studio MUST call `getArchivedChange(name)` via `port-archived-changes` and MUST NOT call `getChange` or `getChangeStatus` for that name. The shell MUST mark the center context as archived read-only.

rules.requirement: archive rows show name only without per-row state or archive action chrome
rules: Rows in the Archive section MUST display the change `name` only. They MUST NOT repeat an `archived` state label on each row (the section heading already identifies the list). They MUST NOT show a hover archive icon or other row action that implies archiving again.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).
